story.text:
# 🗺️ Drake Island
**geography** · shared · narrative

The geography beneath the City of Mages. The Drake's plurality (whisperer · place · fire · elder) is honoured here as ambient presence — never reified into a single avatar. The 12-quest 4-arc Drake v2 path is what the Sovereign walks before entering the city. The first foundation of the City of Mages: each Sovereign lays a stone; the Drake Orb is what they carry forward.
